name: Compay Segundo
abstract: Máximo Francisco Repilado Muñoz Telles (18 November 1907 – 13 July 2003), known professionally as "Compay Segundo", was a Cuban trova guitarist, singer and composer.

concerts.label: Buena Vista Social Club
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Luis Conte
about_quotes.evidence: Those guys were friends with my dad. They’re all from Santiago. And these guys would come in the house and they would have these parties, and I just sit in there
about_quotes.doc_title: Luis Conte interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 24, 2025
